introSection: Swamp Thing is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Wild Adventures in Valdosta, Georgia, USA. It opened on May 10, 2003. The ride is a standard Vekoma Suspended Family Coaster with alligator-themed scenery.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 10 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 20 riders per train.

fullText:
Swamp Thing is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Wild Adventures in Valdosta, Georgia, USA. It opened on May 10, 2003. The ride is a standard Vekoma Suspended Family Coaster with alligator-themed scenery.



10 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 20 riders per train.
